title: minuartia brevis
intro: Minuartia brevis, also known as short-stemmed dwarf sandwort, is a low-growing perennial plant species in the carnation family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been shown to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Minuartia brevis is often used in infusions or tinctures to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
